caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and flows between the concepts. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking, likely explaining the connections and significance of each node within the broader context of systems thinking. The background shows multiple browser tabs open, indicating that the presentation might involve referencing various resources or topics related to the subject matter.
